gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 史诗级归乡之旅，神话与人性交织的视觉奇观。
gems.whyWatchEn: An epic homecoming journey where myth and humanity intertwine in a visual spectacle.
gems.audience: 喜欢宏大叙事、神话改编和视觉震撼的影迷，以及《荷马史诗》爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of grand narratives, mythological adaptations, and visual spectacle, as well as Homeric epic enthusiasts.
